mapper.sql: select iteration_id, project_id, name, goal, status, start_date, end_date, completed_at, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from iteration where deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into iteration (project_id, name, goal, status, start_date, end_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{projectId}, #{name}, #{goal}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now())
mapper.update:
update iteration
name = #{name}, goal = #{goal}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where iteration_id = #{iterationId} and deleted = 0
update iteration set deleted = 1 where iteration_id = #{iterationId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from iteration where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
